src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation to reflect the latest generator version.
Reformat the annotation declaration to use a single-line style instead of a multi-line block.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with Spring Boot 3.x default behavior or security best practices.
Rename the logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where the type is obvious, leveraging Java 10+ features.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to improve code readability and reuse in the startup log message.
Reformat the Optional chain for protocol determination to improve readability by placing method calls on separate lines.
Update all logger method calls to use the renamed 'LOG' variable instead of 'log'.
Replace explicit Logger type with var keyword for local variable declaration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Logger log = logger(joinPoint); -> var log = logger(joinPoint);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace ternary operator with String.valueOf to safely handle null cause in production logging.
Reformat method chaining and string concatenation for consistent indentation and style.
Introduce a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart property to manage database migration settings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field, getter, and static inner class with asyncStart boolean and its accessors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate logger instance from private final field to private static final constant following standard Java logging conventions.
Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable inference.
Rename constant from SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for consistency or clarity.
Remove fields and setter methods for GitProperties and BuildProperties that are no longer used in the class.
Remove the KeyGenerator bean definition and its associated imports as it is no longer required.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable initialization.
Reformat the Ehcache configuration builder chain for better readability.
Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support modern Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Add conditional annotation to H2 TCP server bean to ensure it only starts when H2 console is explicitly enabled.
Refactor logger instance to use static final field convention.
Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace instance logger field with static final logger constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Inject ApplicationProperties to support configurable Liquibase startup behavior.
Make Liquibase asynchronous startup configurable via application properties instead of hardcoded.
Convert contexts list to comma-delimited string only if not empty to avoid passing null/empty strings.
Convert label filter list to comma-delimited string only if not empty to avoid passing null/empty strings.
Replace explicit String type with var for the customFields variable to modernize code style.
Replace explicit JHipsterProperties.Logging types with var for loggingProperties and logstashProperties to modernize code style.
